nasb.text: Rouse yourself! Rouse yourself! Arise, O Jerusalem, You who have drunk from the Lord’s hand the cup of His anger; The chalice of reeling you have drained to the dregs.

esv.text: Wake yourself, wake yourself, stand up, O Jerusalem, you who have drunk from the hand of the Lord the cup of his wrath, who have drunk to the dregs the bowl, the cup of staggering.

cnv.text: 耶路撒冷啊，醒來！醒來！站起來吧！ 你從耶和華的手中喝了他烈怒的杯， 喝盡了那使人搖搖擺擺的爵。

ccb.text: 耶路撒冷啊，醒来，醒来，站起来吧！你从耶和华手中的杯里喝了祂的愤怒，喝干了那杯使人东倒西歪的酒。

csbs.text: 耶路撒冷啊， 唤醒自己，唤醒自己，站起来吧！ 你从耶和华手中喝了他怒火之杯， 喝尽了那使人踉跄的杯盏。
